reasoning: `tla_exists_proved_by_witness` is external_body bridging `a_to_p(witness).satisfied_by(ex)` to `tla_exists(a_to_p).satisfied_by(ex)` — requires resolving that `tla_exists`'s `TempPred::new` closure-wrapped existential evaluates consistently with the witness. Unverified trust assumption.
`temp_pred_equality` is external_body forcing intensional `==` from mutual entailment. Structurally distinct closures collapsed to equal without proof — separate unverified trust assumption.
Direct soundness consequence of `temp_pred_equality` — if two TempPreds are intensionally distinct but semantically equivalent, this derives `false`.
`∃a. p(a) ∧ q ≡ (∃a. p(a)) ∧ q` is a standard logical equivalence (q doesn't depend on a). This is a verified lemma with no new trust surface beyond φ1 and φ2.

Extracting a witness from `tla_exists` via `choose` is sound — `tla_exists`'s definition directly contains the existential, and SMT can resolve this without external_body axioms. No new trust surface.
